briefdescription.para: This function reads the configuration registers inside the FPGA.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device id of the device.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the value of the specified configuration register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHwIcap instance.
is a constant which represents the configuration register value to be returned.
is the value of the specified configuration register.

briefdescription.para: Generates a Type 1 packet header that reads back the requested Configuration register.

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the register to be read back.
is the size of the word to be read.

simplesect.para: Type 1 packet header to read the specified register

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the DevCfg Reg Read example.
This file contains a design example using the DevCfg driver and hardware device.

detaileddescription.para: This example prints out the values of all the configuration registers in the FPGA.
This example assumes that there is a UART Device or STDIO Device in the hardware system.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
3.1 sb 08/25/14 First Release 3.8 Nava 06/21/23 Added support for system device-tree flow. *
